title: INTENSIVE SCHOOL AND COMMUNITY BASED PROGRAMS - 211info
text: RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH INTENSIVE SCHOOL AND COMMUNITY BASED PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Intensive School Based Program provides a specialized and individualized set of in-home and community based mental health services in the child's home and at public school. Integrated treatment and education program geared towards elementary aged children who have severe mental, emotional and behavioral disorders. Intensive Community Based Treatment Services (ICTS) Outpatient Unit provides psychiatric care management to children and their families. 3995 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Intensive School Based Program: Children ages 6-12; call for detailed eligibility criteria Intensive Community Based Treatment Services: Children ages 3-18; call for detailed eligibility criteria Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 726-1465 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 726-1465 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Referrals can only be made by child's legal guardian; call for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Psychiatric Case Management * Adolescents Psychiatric Case Management * Children School Based Integrated Services Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLABORATIVE PROBLEM SOLVING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WELLNESS AND COMMUNITY HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DAY TREATMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH
